channel.title: Tprrt's Blog - Self-Hosting
channel.description: Embedded Linux, Zephyr RTOS, open-source hardware, Linux gaming, retro gaming, and competitive fitness

item.title: llm-companion: A Self-Hosted, Privacy-First AI Coding Assistant
item.description: A look at llm-companion, a rootless Podman Kubernetes Pod stack that turns a spare Fedora or Debian box into a private, hardware-aware Ollama server for OpenCode — with a practical guide to deploying it.
item.dc:creator: tperrot
